title: Michael Golden
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Michael}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Michael Golden''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] writer and illustrator who worked on a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series. He started working for [[Marvel Comics]] in the 1970s on a series entitled [[Wikipedia:Micronauts|''Micronauts'']], and continued to create comics for Marvel through the 1980s.

{{Artist-stub}}
